-
- Digital Channels (>5M customers)  
- Integration Layer (>6M calls/day)
-
- Testing Services supporting digital releases + platform stability
-
- Enterprise Cloud Platform and SRE Services  
- AI Council + Lab
-  
Digital Transformation:  
Our Approach is focused on foundational and customer value, featuring:  
- Aligned to customer Value- offshore heavy feature teams
- Foundational Component Library
- Test Automation
- De-linked from cloud
- Transformed from monolithic to microservices, creating a "single highway" for top journeys
-  
Digital Acceleration :  
- Progressive modernisation 280~ pages from Legacy to Native and React
- Reusable journey component
- >400% increase in Test Automation
- GENAI to Accelerate delivery
- Responsive Web Design
- Common backend
- Selective Migration  
Transformational Impact :  
- Delivered 250 changes 25 client-facing features in a year
- Measurable Business outcome
- Implemented Hybrid Cloud resilient platform
- 200+ CI intiatives + GenAI in SDLC – 30% efficiency, 95% on time delivery
- Engineer the Hub-and-spoke Cloud platform services Model  
Biweekly deployments – 120 pm  
4.8(iOS)/4.7 (Android) App rating  
Cost savings exceeding £6M efficiency gains  
Offshore/onshore ratio of 90:10  
Tailored structure to capture and develop new ideas, driving significant productivity gains
name: Chunk 2/8

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: A major UK financial services provider and strategic client for IBM Consulting. The engagement spans comprehensive digital, cloud, integration, data, and modernization services across banking, mortgages, retail products, and customer servicing domains, serving over 5 million digital customers.
context: Coverage across all domains within Nationwide

raw_entities.name: Digital
raw_entities.description: A comprehensive digital services offering covering banking applications, internet banking, online shopping, and open banking platforms. Delivered through offshore-heavy feature teams focused on customer value and progressive modernization.

raw_entities.name: Cloud
raw_entities.description: Cloud engineering and platform services leveraging Azure and AWS. Includes SRE services, hybrid cloud resilience, and a hub-and-spoke cloud platform services model to support digital releases and platform stability.
context: Azure and AWS Cloud platform engineering
Enterprise Cloud Platform and SRE Services

raw_entities.name: Integration
raw_entities.description: Strategic integration services building an enterprise-wide service that connects all customer channels into core systems of record. Supports high-volume transaction processing and channel unification.
context: Strategic partner for building the enterprise-wide service connecting all channels into the systems of record.

raw_entities.name: Customer Servicing
raw_entities.description: Development and testing services for branch and call center operations, including colleague portals and conversational voice interfaces. Focuses on improving customer experience and operational workflows.
context: Strategic partner for Development & Testing for Branch and call center

raw_entities.name: Mortgages
raw_entities.description: Specialized offering for home and landlord core banking platforms, including platform migration, comprehensive application testing, and modernization of legacy mortgage systems.
context: Home Mortgages & Landlord Core Banking platform migration

raw_entities.name: Application Support
raw_entities.description: Ongoing application support across digital, integration, customer servicing, and retail products domains, specifically tailored for IBM-developed applications to ensure stability and continuous delivery.
context: Application Support across Digital, Integration, Customer Servicing & Retail Products for IBM developed apps

raw_entities.name: GenAI & Data
raw_entities.description: Strategic GenAI and data platform services including CoE establishment, experimentation, contact center pilots, and DataBricks platform build. Drives AI council initiatives and SDLC acceleration.

raw_entities.name: Change and Application Support
raw_entities.description: End-to-end change management and application maintenance capability covering banking apps, internet banking, online shopping, and open banking platforms, ensuring continuous system stability and feature delivery.
context: Sole Partner providing change and application support across Banking App, Internet Banking, Online shopping application and OpenBanking

raw_entities.name: Cloud Platform Engineering
raw_entities.description: Technical capability to design, build, and manage cloud infrastructure on Azure and AWS, including SRE services and a hub-and-spoke cloud platform services model for resilience and scalability.
context: Azure and AWS Cloud platform engineering
Engineer the Hub-and-spoke Cloud platform services Model

raw_entities.name: Development & Testing
raw_entities.description: Comprehensive development and quality assurance services supporting digital releases, platform stability, and branch/call center applications, including test automation and payments testing.
context: Strategic partner for Development & Testing for Branch and call center
Testing Services supporting digital releases + platform stability

raw_entities.name: Pega Automation
raw_entities.description: Automation capability leveraging Pega/Power platforms to streamline workflows across customer servicing and operational domains, reducing manual effort and improving process efficiency.

raw_entities.name: Platform Migration
raw_entities.description: Specialized migration capability for home mortgages, landlord core banking, and Teradata data platforms, transitioning legacy systems to modern, cloud-native architectures.
context: Home Mortgages & Landlord Core Banking platform migration

raw_entities.name: Test Automation
raw_entities.description: Advanced test automation framework and methodology that has driven a 400% increase in automated testing coverage, supporting faster release cycles and higher quality standards.

raw_entities.name: SRE Services
raw_entities.description: Site Reliability Engineering services integrated with the enterprise cloud platform to ensure high availability, performance monitoring, and proactive incident management for digital channels.
context: Enterprise Cloud Platform and SRE Services

raw_entities.name: Banking App
raw_entities.description: Mobile and digital banking application used by customers for account management and transactions, supported by comprehensive testing, automation, and continuous delivery pipelines.
context: across Banking App, Internet Banking, Online shopping application and OpenBanking

raw_entities.name: Internet Banking
raw_entities.description: Digital web-based banking platform enabling customer self-service and transaction processing, modernized through progressive UI updates and backend microservices transformation.
context: across Banking App, Internet Banking, Online shopping application and OpenBanking

raw_entities.name: Open Banking
raw_entities.description: Open banking ecosystem enabling third-party integrations and API-driven customer experiences, supported by enterprise-wide service integration and secure data exchange.
context: across Banking App, Internet Banking, Online shopping application and OpenBanking

raw_entities.name: Branch and Call Center
raw_entities.description: Physical and virtual customer service touchpoints supported by development, testing, and automation solutions to improve agent productivity and customer interaction quality.
context: Development & Testing for Branch and call center

raw_entities.name: Colleague Portal
raw_entities.description: Internal digital portal for employees to access HR, IT, and operational tools, modernized to improve workforce productivity and self-service capabilities.

raw_entities.name: Conversational Voice
raw_entities.description: Voice-based customer interaction channel enhanced with GenAI and automation to route inquiries, reduce wait times, and improve first-contact resolution rates.

raw_entities.name: SDLC
raw_entities.description: End-to-end software development lifecycle accelerated through GenAI integration, CI initiatives, and automated testing, resulting in significant efficiency gains and faster time-to-market.
context: 200+ CI intiatives + GenAI in SDLC – 30% efficiency, 95% on time delivery

raw_entities.name: Cost Savings Exceeding £6M
raw_entities.description: Quantified financial benefit achieved through operational efficiency improvements, offshore delivery optimization, and automated testing, directly impacting the client's bottom line.

raw_entities.name: 30% Efficiency Gain
raw_entities.description: Measurable operational efficiency improvement driven by GenAI integration within the SDLC and automated workflows, reducing manual effort and accelerating delivery cycles.
context: GenAI in SDLC – 30% efficiency, 95% on time delivery

raw_entities.name: 95% On-Time Delivery
raw_entities.description: High reliability in meeting project deadlines and release schedules, enabled by biweekly deployment cadences, automated testing, and structured offshore/onshore delivery models.
context: GenAI in SDLC – 30% efficiency, 95% on time delivery

raw_entities.name: 400% Increase in Test Automation
raw_entities.description: Significant scaling of automated testing capabilities, reducing regression testing time and improving release confidence across digital and core banking platforms.

raw_entities.name: 250 Client-Facing Features Delivered
raw_entities.description: High-volume delivery of 250 client-facing features and 250 changes within a single year, demonstrating accelerated release velocity and continuous value delivery.
context: Delivered 250 changes 25 client-facing features in a year

raw_entities.name: High App Ratings
raw_entities.description: Superior customer satisfaction metrics reflected in high app store ratings for iOS and Android platforms, indicating successful UX modernization and stable performance.

raw_entities.name: Offshore/Onshore 90:10 Ratio
raw_entities.description: Optimized delivery model leveraging a 90% offshore to 10% onshore resource split, driving significant cost efficiency while maintaining quality and strategic oversight.

raw_entities.name: Customer Delight
raw_entities.description: Positive customer outcomes achieved through releasing impactful features that enhance user experience and meet evolving digital banking expectations.
context: Releasing customer impacting features that delight

raw_entities.name: Legacy Systems
raw_entities.description: Outdated legacy infrastructure and monolithic architectures hindering agility, scalability, and modern customer experience delivery, necessitating progressive modernization and selective migration.
context: Progressive modernisation 280~ pages from Legacy to Native and React

raw_entities.name: Monolithic Architecture
raw_entities.description: Rigid monolithic system structure limiting deployment speed and scalability, addressed through transformation to microservices and a unified 'single highway' for top customer journeys.
context: Transformed from monolithic to microservices, creating a "single highway" for top journeys

raw_entities.name: Azure
raw_entities.description: Cloud computing platform used for platform engineering, hosting digital services, and supporting hybrid cloud resilience alongside AWS.
context: Azure and AWS Cloud platform engineering

raw_entities.name: AWS
raw_entities.description: Cloud computing platform utilized for infrastructure engineering, digital hosting, and supporting scalable, resilient cloud services for the client.
context: Azure and AWS Cloud platform engineering

raw_entities.name: DataBricks
raw_entities.description: Unified data analytics and AI platform used for data platform build, GenAI experimentation, and modern data architecture supporting analytics and machine learning workloads.

raw_entities.name: Teradata
raw_entities.description: Legacy enterprise data warehouse platform undergoing migration to modern cloud-native architectures, improving data accessibility and analytics performance.

raw_entities.name: Pega
raw_entities.description: Low-code automation and case management platform used to build and optimize workflows across customer servicing and operational domains.

raw_entities.name: React
raw_entities.description: Modern JavaScript UI library used for progressive modernization of legacy interfaces into native, responsive web designs.
context: Progressive modernisation 280~ pages from Legacy to Native and React

raw_entities.name: iOS
raw_entities.description: Mobile operating system platform hosting the client's banking application, achieving a 4.8-star rating through continuous quality engineering and UX improvements.

raw_entities.name: Android
raw_entities.description: Mobile operating system platform hosting the client's banking application, delivering a 4.7-star rating through stable releases and responsive design.

raw_entities.name: CI
raw_entities.description: Continuous integration tools and practices enabling automated code merging, testing, and deployment, supporting 200+ CI initiatives and biweekly release cadences.

raw_entities.name: Sole Partner Status
raw_entities.description: Exclusive strategic partnership status providing end-to-end change, application support, and integration services, demonstrating deep trust and comprehensive domain coverage.
context: Sole Partner providing change and application support across Banking App
Strategic partner for building the enterprise-wide service

raw_entities.name: Award-Winning Team
raw_entities.description: Highly recognized delivery organization with a proven track record of releasing customer-impacting features and driving measurable business outcomes.
context: Releasing customer impacting features that delight while also driving cost savings for the society

raw_entities.name: Offshore Heavy Delivery Model
raw_entities.description: Cost-optimized delivery model leveraging offshore-heavy feature teams aligned to customer value, enabling scalability and significant efficiency gains without compromising quality.
context: Aligned to customer Value- offshore heavy feature teams

raw_entities.name: Progressive Modernisation
raw_entities.description: Strategic approach to modernizing 280+ legacy pages into native React interfaces, combined with selective migration and reusable journey components to minimize disruption.
context: Progressive modernisation 280~ pages from Legacy to Native and React

raw_entities.name: Biweekly Deployment Cadence
raw_entities.description: Accelerated release cadence enabling biweekly deployments with 120 product managers, demonstrating high velocity, streamlined governance, and rapid value realization.

raw_entities.name: Tailored Innovation Structure
raw_entities.description: Custom organizational structure designed to capture, develop, and scale new ideas, driving significant productivity gains and continuous service improvement.
context: Tailored structure to capture and develop new ideas, driving significant productivity gains

raw_entities.name: IBM Consulting
raw_entities.description: The primary consulting and technology services provider delivering digital, cloud, integration, and data modernization solutions to the client.
context: IBM Consulting / © 2025 IBM Corporation /IBM & Nationwide Confidential

raw_entities.name: IBM Corporation
raw_entities.description: The parent technology and consulting corporation owning the intellectual property, platforms, and delivery frameworks utilized in the engagement.
context: IBM Consulting / © 2025 IBM Corporation /IBM & Nationwide Confidential

raw_entities.name: Offshore
raw_entities.description: Geographic delivery location hosting the majority of the engineering and support workforce, enabling cost optimization and scalable capacity for the client's digital and cloud initiatives.

raw_entities.name: Onshore
raw_entities.description: Local delivery location providing strategic oversight, client-facing coordination, and specialized expertise complementing the offshore-heavy delivery model.

raw_entities.name: Contact Center GenAI Pilots
raw_entities.description: Experimental pilot initiatives applying GenAI to contact center operations, testing AI-driven automation, routing, and customer interaction capabilities before broader rollout.
